name: Castles ~N~ Coasters
description: Castles N' Coasters is an amusement park and family amusement center located in Phoenix, Arizona.  The approximately 14 acre park features four outdoor 18-hole miniature golf courses, several rides, and an indoor video game arcade.  The park was built in 1976, and is designed in a Middle-Eastern motif though other eras are featured such as the Wild West-themed miniature golf course and log flume ride.
